vocab.example: The most captivating aspect of my course is the constant intellectual stimulation I get from debating complex ethical theories.
In my psychology studies, it is fascinating to see how empirical evidence often contradicts our common intuitions about human behavior.

vocab.meaning: sự thay đổi mang tính bước ngoặt trong tư duy/nhận thức
vocab.example: Learning about quantum mechanics caused a complete paradigm shift in how I perceive the physical world.
I find the practical application of abstract mathematical models in solving real-world engineering problems to be incredibly rewarding.

vocab.meaning: đi sâu vào những chi tiết phức tạp
vocab.example: My favorite part of the curriculum is when we delve into the intricacies of international trade laws.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/chặt chẽ trong học thuật
vocab.example: While the academic rigor of this medical degree is exhausting, the depth of knowledge we gain is unparalleled.
Studying world history has truly helped broaden my horizons and fostered a more global perspective on current events.
The most interesting thing is how my degree has equipped me with an analytical mindset to dissect data more effectively.

vocab.meaning: khám phá/giải mã những bí ẩn
vocab.example: I’ve always loved biology because it allows us to slowly unravel the mysteries of the human genome.

vocab.meaning: mở đường cho/tạo tiền đề cho
vocab.example: I find it exciting that the research I'm doing now might pave the way for more sustainable energy solutions in the future.
